aboutCards.title: Curiosity
aboutCards.description: I constantly explore new technologies, ideas, and perspectives because learning never truly stops.

aboutCards.title: Passion
aboutCards.description: Every project is another opportunity to create something meaningful while becoming a better developer.

aboutCards.title: Growth
aboutCards.description: I am continuously expanding my skills to become a better developer and problem solver.

journey.title: JHS | Started Learning Programming
journey.description: My programming journey began with Visual Basic, where I learned the fundamentals of coding, logical thinking, and problem solving.

journey.title: College | Started Computer Science
journey.description: Began pursuing a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science while exploring algorithms, object-oriented programming, and software development.

journey.title: Built Java Applications
journey.description: Developed networking applications, quiz systems, shopping systems, and data structure projects using Java.

journey.title: Exploring Frontend Development
journey.description: Focusing on responsive web development, UI/UX design, and creating modern portfolio websites.

projects.title: Hangman Game
projects.description: A terminal-based Hangman game featuring randomized word selection, interactive gameplay, and a responsive design that provides an engaging and enjoyable user experience.

projects.title: Java Quiz System
projects.description: A client-server quiz application developed using Java sockets, supporting multiple users, score tracking, and JSON file handling.

projects.title: Shopping Management System
projects.description: A Java desktop application featuring product management, sorting, searching, and file handling using different data structures.

projects.title: Himaya Cosmetics
projects.description: A marketing & commercial website that sells cosmetics

beyond.title: 📚 Reading
beyond.description: Discovering new ideas, stories, and perspectives that shape my creativity.

beyond.title: 🎨 Art & Museums
beyond.description: Appreciating thoughtful design, architecture, and visual storytelling.

beyond.title: 🎵 Music
beyond.description: Finding inspiration through meaningful lyrics and beautiful compositions.

beyond.title: 🧶 Crocheting
beyond.description: A hobby that reminds me that patience creates beautiful results.

beyond.title: 🌿 Nature
beyond.description: Walking outdoors helps me recharge, reflect, and think creatively.

beyond.description: Enjoying cafés, journaling, and quiet moments that encourage mindfulness.
